tgy.name: TGY
tgy.notes: Internal inventory ledger item. This variation is not meant to be sold directly.

4s.name: 4S
4s.notes: Internal inventory ledger item for Four Seasons tea. This variation is not meant to be sold directly.

matcha.name: Matcha
matcha.notes: Internal inventory ledger item for matcha. Fill in the Square variation ID after creating the supply item.

black_tea.name: Black Tea
black_tea.notes: Internal inventory ledger item for black tea. Fill in the Square variation ID after creating the supply item.

buckwheat.name: Buckwheat
buckwheat.notes: Internal inventory ledger item. Fill in the Square variation ID and brew ratio after creating the supply item.

barley.name: Barley
barley.notes: Internal inventory ledger item. Fill in the Square variation ID and brew ratio after creating the supply item.

green_tea.name: Green Tea
green_tea.notes: Internal inventory ledger item. Fill in the Square variation ID and brew ratio after creating the supply item.

genmai.name: Genmai
genmai.notes: Internal inventory ledger item. Fill in the Square variation ID and brew ratio after creating the supply item.
